tasks.title: Resolve open-notebook git-history key-shaped documentation candidates

tasks.title: Define target Hapa code spine and companion content vault
tasks.description: Write a formal folder/system structure that is understandable to humans and AIs while preserving node modularity.

tasks.description: Document which Second Brain files belong in publishable source, which belong in the companion vault, and how the app should read them.

tasks.title: Define node modularity contract
tasks.description: Specify how each node keeps its README, AGENTS, manifest, local data-root config, ports/auth, tests, and related-node links while living under the code spine.

tasks.title: Inventory large assets, generated outputs, and runtime databases
tasks.description: Locate large images, videos, audio, generated folders, DBs, model weights, app bundles, and staging exports that should not enter GitHub source.

tasks.title: Update docs linking nodes together
tasks.description: Add or refresh documentation that points each repo to the Hapa front door, wiki, Second Brain, Overwatch board, related nodes, and data roots.

tasks.title: Create reviewable local scaffold for target roots

tasks.title: Write migration playbook and acceptance gates
tasks.description: Define phases for inventory, quarantine, source copy/submodule registration, data-root wiring, repo tests, docs refresh, publication, and asset vault transfer.

tasks.title: Record first architecture checkpoint

tasks.title: Create executable publication preflight and vault dry-run tooling
